---
title: "FMI 3.0 & FMPy Cheat Sheet"
resources:
  - assets/cheatsheet/**
---

A quick-reference cheat sheet covering FMI 3.0 (Co-Simulation & Model Exchange) and the FMPy Python library — all in one page.

You can also [open it in a new tab](./assets/cheatsheet/fmi_cheatsheet.html){target="_blank"} or [run the examples in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/Dr-ClementCoic/fmi-cheat-sheet/blob/main/fmpy_cheatsheet_notebook.ipynb){target="_blank"}.

## The Cheat Sheet 👇

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="./assets/cheatsheet/fmi_cheatsheet.html"
  style="width: 100%; height: 85vh; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 6px;"
  title="FMI 3.0 & FMPy Cheat Sheet"
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>
```

## The END for today

*Break is over, go back to what you were doing.*

Clem

[Next](./about.qmd) ->
